ai_agent.role: Manages post-delivery warranty claims, closing pre-sale repairs, lawn maintenance, shower glass door tracking, and centralized warranty data management

staff.name: Taylane Silva
staff.role: Closing & Warranty Leader — in-person realtor/investor contact, pre-sale repairs, key management, walkthrough scheduling

staff.name: Sophia Felizola
staff.role: Warranty — repair requests processing, sub coordination, lawn cut management, 3 daily logs per repair

staff.name: Kildery Diniz
staff.role: Data Management — complex tracking spreadsheets (statistics background), CEO/sale tracking, shower glass door tracking, lawn data, PO control

core_knowledge.description: 8-step flow: Receive (email 100% formal) → Validate coverage → Identify responsible sub → Route via WhatsApp → Schedule repair → Execute with photo confirmation → Verify (Supervisor Daniel) → Close. 3 daily logs per repair: open claim, schedule, finalize.

Structural: 10 years. Mechanical (HVAC/Plumbing/Electrical): 2 years. Cosmetic (Paint/Flooring): 1 year. Appliances: per manufacturer. Roofing workmanship: 2 years. All start from date of occupancy/sale (NOT CO date).

Subcontractors count 1 year from THEIR completion date, not from sale date. Creates gap period where Lakeshore covers warranty but sub may refuse free repair. When sub guarantee expires, new PO required through Financeiro.

Data loggers report weekly via Slack. Open houses: cut directly. Closed houses: need CR authorization (exception: Gabriel and Vittor houses pre-authorized). Pricing: ≤0.22 acres=$50, ≤0.33 acres=$60, ≤0.50=quote, above=special quote, cap $30 for standard cuts.
Private inspector lists repairs needed before sale. Taylane receives via WhatsApp/email, categorizes by trade (electric, plumbing, finishing), dispatches subs, clears house for sale.
Pre-requisites: tile and vinyl must be complete. Kildery tracks via BT tags. Flow: tile/vinyl done → house enabled → sub measures → PO created → installation → Beauty Final → CEO.

daily_workflows.name: Warranty Claim Processing
steps: Receive client repair request by email (100% formal channel)
Register in tracking spreadsheet (request, repair type, date)
Validate warranty coverage (occupancy/sale date vs current date)
Route to responsible sub via WhatsApp (specific groups by trade)
Follow up every 3 days if no response
Register in Builder Trend: open claim → schedule → finalize (3 daily logs)
Sub confirms completion with photo
Supervisor Daniel verifies during route visits
critical_decisions: Whether claim is within coverage period
Whether to use original sub or find alternative

daily_workflows.name: Lawn Cut Coordination
steps: Receive data logger reports via Slack
Check house status: open (direct request) or closed (need CR authorization)
Calculate lawn size via database + VLOOKUP
Send list to sub with pin point, address, and size
Control deadlines (max 5 days, target 2-3 days)
Register PO and values per pricing table
Receive photo/video proof from sub
critical_decisions: Prioritizing urgent cuts to avoid county fines

daily_workflows.name: Data Tracking and Management (Kildery)
steps: Update CEO tracking tab (CO date, sale/occupancy date)
Update repair status with delay tracking (mark >3 days)
Update shower glass door, tile, vinyl, cabinets tracking
Manage lawn cut data (addresses, sizes, authorizations, costs)
Maintain house database (addresses, cities, sq ft, acres)
Control POs
Generate decision-support information
critical_decisions: Identifying systemic patterns in warranty claims

features_used: Rework Queue — assign to handymen, dispatch, or postpone
Handymen Kanban Board — track rework progress
Completed History — permanent record with duration
Site Visits — schedule verification visits for warranty repairs
Photo Review — review photos of completed warranty work

handoffs.trigger: CO issued — house can be delivered
handoffs.impact: Triggers closing process — warranty period countdown begins at sale

handoffs.trigger: Lawn cut authorization for closed houses
handoffs.impact: Without authorization, warranty cannot dispatch lawn crews to closed houses

handoffs.trigger: Repair POs and lawn cut POs created
handoffs.data_exchanged: PO reference, repair description, sub name, amount

handoffs.trigger: Repair status update for client communication

pain_points.description: No dedicated warranty software — all tracking via spreadsheets and Builder Trend. Significant financial losses (example: $14,000 loss on a single house due to tracking failures)
pain_points.current_workaround: Kildery's complex spreadsheet system centralizes data from multiple sources
pain_points.proposed_solution: Dedicated warranty management module in Const App with automated SLA tracking

pain_points.description: 3 daily logs required per repair (open claim, schedule, finalize) — excessive manual input
pain_points.proposed_solution: Automated log generation from claim status changes

pain_points.description: Subs frequently do not respond to warranty requests — repeated follow-ups via WhatsApp
pain_points.current_workaround: Chase every 3 days; escalate to Supervisao at 7 days
pain_points.proposed_solution: Contractual warranty SLA with penalties for non-response

pain_points.description: Sub guarantee period conflict — sub counts 1 year from completion, Lakeshore counts from sale date, creating uncovered gaps
pain_points.current_workaround: Lakeshore absorbs cost when sub refuses; Financeiro pays via new PO
pain_points.proposed_solution: Contractual alignment of sub warranty period with company warranty

tribal_knowledge.description: Multi-tab spreadsheet with VLOOKUP formulas, delay tracking (>3 days flag), CEO tracking, shower glass door dependencies, lawn cut pricing calculations, and house database. Created by a statistics graduate — not documented or replicable.
tribal_knowledge.risk_if_lost: Total loss of centralized warranty visibility; financial tracking would break down

tribal_knowledge.description: Sophia knows which subs respond quickly to warranty calls, which require multiple follow-ups, and which refuse certain types of repairs. Also knows which WhatsApp groups to use for each trade.
tribal_knowledge.risk_if_lost: Repair routing becomes trial-and-error; response times increase

tribal_knowledge.description: Taylane maintains personal relationships with realtors and investors, knows pre-sale inspection patterns, and manages the key custody process.
tribal_knowledge.risk_if_lost: Closing process delays; key management confusion

training_curriculum.quiz_coverage: Coverage periods, claim steps, SLA milestones, Daily Log tags
Closing flow, document types, key custody rules
Pricing tiers, authorization exceptions, deadline rules

compliance_requirements.requirement: 1-year builder warranty from date of occupancy/sale per contract Clause 13
compliance_requirements.regulation: Construction Contract — Lakeshore Lira Investments Corp.
compliance_requirements.verification: Warranty start date calculated from sale/occupancy, not CO

compliance_requirements.requirement: Post-walkthrough issues must go through formal warranty process (email)
compliance_requirements.verification: All claims tracked via email channel; informal requests redirected

compliance_requirements.requirement: Utility transfer within 10 business days of closing
compliance_requirements.verification: Dandara monitors utility account status post-closing

key_metrics.measurement: Tracking spreadsheet: date received vs date finalized
